title: ToukenCraft
description: Mod to explore the world of Minecraft with touken danshi.
body:
# Touken Craft (刀剣クラフト)

This is a mod to explore the world of Minecraft with [touken danshi](https://www.toukenranbu.jp/).

## Features

* Add weapons of Japanese swords(刀剣)
* Add entites of touken danshi(刀剣男士)
* Summon touken danshi from sword
* Add uchiko(打粉) to heal touken danshi

Version 1.x includes these swords.

* Kashuu Kiyomitsu(加州清光)
* Kasen Kanesada(歌仙兼定)
* Mutsunokami Yoshiyuki(陸奥守吉行)
* Yamanbagiri Kunihiro(山姥切国広)
* Hachisuka Kotetsu(蜂須賀虎徹)

Using [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) are recommended to check recipes.

If you're using Forge, try [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector).

## Screenshots

### v1.1.x

The textures for the touken danshi are now included in the MOD.

![v1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AhnrHmLv/images/30f3fb1d9613abc736457465ebf5858009003e6d.png)

### v1.0.x

Screenshots below use [textures](https://matsuba333.hatenablog.com/entry/2015/08/02/134709) created by 松葉([@matsuba333](https://x.com/matsuba333)).  
This mod does **not** include these textures.  
The template of resource pack is [here](https://github.com/toukencraft/ResourcepackTemplate).

* Create sword

![Create sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4fff99916fb5f531ea86194f02abcaaf28f39ba.png)

* Summon touken danshi

![Summon touken danshi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4531ed52d3ed2aa1820089c9f8d46374c433e51d.png)

* Create uchiko

![Create uchiko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a41ba627d754cedb098b7dc81f1efe2447e8c8ac.png)

* Heal touken danshi

![Heal touken danshi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/917bda0025e41c7b860ee7552a2d6bfd5db9cb74.png)
